name: lexical_identifiers_test
description: Lexical reliability for analyst scripts: valid naming patterns, numeric forms, comments, escapes, and invalid-token recovery

name: syntax_error_recovery_test
description: Robust parser diagnostics for malformed analytics scripts with multi-point recovery and continued parsing

name: semantic_runtime_safety_test
description: Combined semantic+runtime guardrails: duplicate declarations, undeclared symbols, type coercion, divide/modulo-by-zero, feed index type+bounds, and arity mismatch diagnostics

name: execution_accounts_metrics_test
description: End-to-end account analytics lifecycle: setup, updates, arithmetic metric changes, status flags, story posting, and reporting

name: controlflow_loops_test
description: Growth simulation and strategy logic: all loop types, break/continue controls, and rule-based decisions with AND/OR/NOT

name: functions_builtins_test
description: Reusable analytics workflows: user functions plus built-in reporting for virality, engagement, growth, feed insights, and text safety

name: input_io_test
description: Interactive planning workflow: stdin-driven metrics, variable expressions, and branching strategy decisions from live input

name: arrays_optimizer_integration_test
description: Practical feed analytics + optimizer integration: post-level feed modeling, indexed retrieval, feed iteration/length usage, and measurable TAC reduction
